eye_holder_ready.title: Confirm the Eye Holder is placed with all 12 eyes displayed

subtitle.text: You have eaten the dragon and displayed its inheritance. You understand this place now. You may leave.

description: - Eaten the dragon (Dungeon Meshi — comprehension through consumption)
- Defeated the Ender Trigon (the thing that was never supposed to be found)
- Looted the End Cities (extracted everything they contained)
- Displayed twelve civilizations' eyes (documented what came before)
The Dragon Void scroll is found in End City loot chests and on the Ender Trigon.
It formalizes your claim to this territory.
The dragon age is the age of completion.
Everything that the End was supposed to contain, you have now addressed.
Ch15 is the aftermath. The Frieren chapter.
The adventure is over. Now comes the long walk home.
→ Display the Eye Holder with all 12 eyes [check]
